Eternity Taking damage from champions restores 10% of the damage as Mana . Casting an ability heals for 25% of Mana spent.

items.name: Heartsteel
items.description: 900 Health 100% Base Health Regen Colossal Consumption (0s) per target If an enemy champion is nearby for a few seconds, your next Attack against them deals 70 plus 6% of your max Health as bonus physical damage and grants 10% of the damage as max Health. Goliath For each 1000 max Health , gain 3% increased size, up to 30%.
